recommendations.title: 2 States
recommendations.overview: A man and a woman come from two very different cultural backgrounds, and decide that they won't get married until they convince their parents. As feared, differences between the families pose a hurdle.

recommendations.title: High Society
recommendations.overview: Two girls from very different social backgrounds discover, at the age of 25, that they had been switched at birth.

recommendations.title: Cold War
recommendations.overview: A man and a woman meet in the ruins of post-war Poland. With vastly different backgrounds and temperaments, they are fatally mismatched and yet drawn to each other.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.
Two university students gain insight into life and love as they get to know each other during a road trip across Europe.

recommendations.title: 25 km/h
recommendations.overview: A road movie about two very different brothers who have not seen each other for 20 years: city manager Christian  and cabinetmaker Georg, who never left their hometown and took care of their father until his passing.  After their fathers funeral, the

recommendations.title: Merry Christmas, Mr. Lawrence
recommendations.overview: Island of Java, 1942, during World War II. British Major Jack Celliers arrives at a Japanese prison camp, run by the strict Captain Yonoi. Colonel John Lawrence, who has a profound knowledge of Japanese culture, and Sergeant Hara, brutal and simpleto

recommendations.title: Grand Canyon
recommendations.overview: Grand Canyon revolved around six residents from different backgrounds whose lives intertwine in modern-day Los Angeles. At the center of the film is the unlikely friendship of two men from different races and classes brought together when one finds h

recommendations.title: Never Back Down 2: The Beatdown
recommendations.overview: Four fighters from different backgrounds come together to train under an ex MMA rising star and then ultimately have to fight each other and the traitor in their midst.

recommendations.title: Saving Face
recommendations.overview: A Chinese-American lesbian and her traditionalist mother are reluctant to go public with secret loves that clash against cultural expectations.
